reasoning: Addressing poor lactate clearance is crucial for improving Koren's fatigue resistance and aerobic base. The last ride showed a moderate intensity effort but lacked targeted work on Koren's limiter. This workout focuses on boosting performance on the key Alpine Loop climb by enhancing Koren's ability to sustain higher power outputs over prolonged periods.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12-minute over-unders (4 mins at 218W, 4 mins at 242W, 4 mins at 256W) with 3 mins easy spinning between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
